expectations.evidence: No portalIntegration section.

notes: Schema conformance and Moral Gray Rule are the primary differentiators — baselines fail both consistently.
Portal integration (gamification hooks) only appears with the skill, never in baselines.
Scientific accuracy passes in both configurations — the model has strong forensic knowledge regardless.
Spatial detail passes in both configurations — but with-skill outputs use metric measurements consistently.
With-skill runs use ~33% more tokens and ~34% more time, but achieve 100% pass rate vs 67%.
The baseline blood spatter output actually includes student calculation tasks (angle of impact) and a rubric — features the skill doesn't explicitly request but are pedagogically valuable.
